title: TNT extension 1.4
body:
# TNT extension 1.4 ūüß®
*TNT extension adds some new and explosive tnt tools*

# Features‚ú®

‚ě°ÔłŹ get all items via ```/function tnt:give_tnt```

## **Infinite TNT**ūüß®

![infinite tnt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/155d4b62e76b48279e5761034ce4637aa1bc8dd9_0.webp)
- hold rightclick to use
- summon 20 tnt per second
- Explosion level **1/4**


## **Infinite TNT minecart**ūüöā
![Infinite TNT minecart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baf13706a77db2c0b3f4be087feef5eeff626f73_0.webp)

- hold rightclick to use
- summon 20 tnt minecarts per second
- Explosion level **2/4**

**Tipūüí°: Use it on the ground and hold rightclick a longer time and move**

## **TNT Blaster**ūüĒę

![TNT Blaster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6934a7fe5c175495a86724607a4f8aaf33abb6fa_0.webp)

- Click rightclick to chargeūüĒę
- click again to fireūüéÜ
- works like a crossbow with explosive arrows, multishot 255 and quick charge 255
- Does also work underwaterūüźü
- Explosion level **3/4**
## **Super TNT**ūüéÜ

![Super TNT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/feaa59695951c446fa47c86e0a3242cd8a3161e7_0.webp)

- Click one time to use (5s cooldown‚ŹĪÔłŹ)
- summon 1001 TNT minecartsūüöā
  - let them explode like the infinite TNT minecart
- The explosion takes like 3minūüēįÔłŹ
- Explosion level **4/4**

## Recipesūüõ†ÔłŹ

TNT Blaster recipe

![Super TNT recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14f379881cdb4753b78f3da8d46f0748b2e272cc.png)
Super TNT recipe
